results.title: Microsoft, Meta, and Google just announced billions more in AI spending | Fortune
Google wraps up best month since 2004 as earnings push Alphabet stock up 34% in April
Amazon vs. Meta: Which Stock Will Win Over the Next Decade? - 24/7 Wall St.

summary: Alphabet raised full-year capex to $180-190B; Google Cloud revenue +63% YoY to $20B — Alphabet stock +7% after hours vs META -6%. Microsoft essentially flat. Key contrast: Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon have cloud businesses that monetize AI investments directly; Meta does not. Amazon stock holding up well. Market rewarding cloud-tied AI spend over pure social/advertising AI plays.
